transcript.content: ugh, today was just such a disaster. my boss literally dumped a week's worth of reports on my desk at 4:30 PM and expected me to just smile and stay late. i'm so exhausted.

sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i'm probably just letting a bad day get to my head too much. i think i just need to get some sleep and i'll feel a bit better tomorrow.
